codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly delivers the React app shell with dark theme (#1a1a1a background, #e8a23a amber accent), Cormorant Garamond/DM Sans/JetBrains Mono fonts, 420px sidebar + flex main panel layout, and custom title bar with frameless window controls. The shell uses placeholder divs for components that will be implemented in separate features, which is appropriate for an 'app shell' scope. TypeScript compiles without errors, all 67 tests pass, and build succeeds.

summary: The react-app-shell feature correctly implements the basic app structure: TitleBar component with window controls (minimize/maximize/close), global CSS with design tokens, two-panel layout (420px sidebar, flex detail panel), and Google Fonts integration. The implementation matches the feature description and all verification steps pass (typecheck, tests, build).
